inputs.label: Gross Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Total measured weight including container or packaging

inputs.label: Tare Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of empty container or packaging

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final net weight output

formulas.netWeightKg: roundingMode === 0 ? Math.round(kgUnrounded * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : roundingMode === 1 ? Math.floor(kgUnrounded * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : Math.ceil(kgUnrounded * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
